query: most recent reported annual revenue of Apple in USD billions
answer: Apple's most recent reported annual revenue was $387.53 billion in 2022. This figure represents a 2.44% increase from the previous year. The most recent data indicates a 2.02% rise in 2024 to $391.035 billion.
